title: Dictionary Methods Practice
instructions: Practice using dictionary methods like keys(), values(), items(), update(), pop(), and setdefault().
hints: Iterate over items() to find key by value
Use pop() with default to safely remove keys
Use get() with default 0 to count values
Use get() to add to existing value or start at 0

testCases.description: get_key_by_value should return the first key that has the target value
testCases.validation: assert get_key_by_value({'a': 1, 'b': 2, 'c': 3}, 2) == 'b', 'get_key_by_value should find key b for value 2'

testCases.description: get_key_by_value should return None when value is not found
testCases.validation: assert get_key_by_value({'a': 1, 'b': 2}, 5) is None, 'get_key_by_value should return None when value not found'

testCases.description: remove_keys should remove specified keys from the dictionary
testCases.validation: assert remove_keys({'a': 1, 'b': 2, 'c': 3}, ['a', 'c']) == {'b': 2}, 'remove_keys should remove keys a and c'

testCases.description: count_values should count how many times each value appears
testCases.validation: assert count_values({'a': 1, 'b': 2, 'c': 1, 'd': 2, 'e': 1}) == {1: 3, 2: 2}, 'count_values should count value occurrences'

testCases.description: merge_sum_values should sum values for shared keys
testCases.validation: assert merge_sum_values({'a': 1, 'b': 2}, {'b': 3, 'c': 4}) == {'a': 1, 'b': 5, 'c': 4}, 'merge_sum_values should sum shared key b: 2+3=5'

testCases.description: remove_keys should handle keys that don't exist without error
testCases.validation: assert remove_keys({'a': 1}, ['b', 'c']) == {'a': 1}, 'remove_keys should ignore missing keys gracefully'

description: Practice essential dictionary methods in Python. Use items() to find keys by value, pop() with defaults to safely remove multiple keys, get() with default values to count value occurrences, and combine copy() with get() to merge dictionaries while summing values for common keys. These methods are crucial for real-world data manipulation.
